title: Hornet Removal in Englewood, NJ | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Englewood, NJ. Safe, effective nest elimination for homes and businesses. Call Best Pest Control NYC today for fast service!
intro: Hornets can pose a serious threat to Englewood residents and their properties, building aggressive nests in eaves, trees, and attics throughout the area. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional hornet removal services specifically tailored to Englewood's unique residential and commercial properties. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations, protecting your family and guests from painful stings.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Englewood and the greater Bergen County area for years with fast, reliable hornet removal services. Our licensed technicians use safe, proven methods to remove nests completely while offering competitive pricing from $350-$550 and same-day service availability.
localContext: Englewood's beautiful tree-lined streets, historic homes near the Palisades, and proximity to parks like Flat Rock Brook Nature Center create ideal habitats for hornets to nest. From the bustling downtown area along Palisade Avenue to residential neighborhoods near Dwight Morrow High School, we protect all of Englewood's diverse properties from aggressive hornet colonies.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Englewood?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service throughout Englewood, NJ. Once you contact us, we can typically dispatch a technician within hours to assess and safely remove the hornet nest, ensuring your property is secure as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough inspection to locate all nests, complete nest removal using professional-grade equipment and protective gear, treatment of the area to prevent re-infestation, and disposal of the nest. The final price depends on nest size, location accessibility, and the number of nests present.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Englewood?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our certified technicians use environmentally responsible methods and professional protective equipment to safely remove hornet nests without endangering your family, pets, or property. We take all necessary precautions to contain the hornets during removal and advise you on any temporary safety measures needed during the service.

faqs.question: How can I tell if I have hornets versus wasps or bees?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than typical wasps, measuring up to 2 inches long, with distinctive white and black or brown and yellow coloring. Their nests are typically large, papery, and enclosed (unlike open wasp combs), often found in trees, attics, or under eaves. If you're unsure, our Englewood technicians can identify the species during inspection and recommend the appropriate removal strategy.
